productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Printed Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This T-shirt from classic polo is perfect for the alpha male who wants to capture the minimal mood of the moment. This tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe. Wear with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the outdoors, style with casual shoes and an understated belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
